Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Continued To Dec-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Bauliser for Herbert Brynjolfsson (Executor).

Ms. Baulsier stated that she was waiting for a response from the Franchise Tax Board (FTB), that the FTB indicated that they would mail a statement to them by November 8, 2012 showing that there are no Creditors and that she wanted to do everything all at once. The accounting petition was continued to December 11, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

Off Calendar Sep-04-2012 Continued To Sep-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Baulsier for Herbert Brynjolfsson.

The Court stated that it reviewed the signature on the will and that it took the position that the Decedent signed the will, that it is not a mark and that it is satisfied with the explanation of Ms. Baulsier. The Court also stated that the name of the Son on the will differs by one letter on the notice and that it was a typoghraphical error. Ms. Baulsier stated that it was the person, that the correct name is the name on the will, that he received notice, that she spoke to him and that he received the life insurance proceeds. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
